blocks.text: Save me, O God, by your name, and vindicate me by your might.
Ps 54: God’s saving power. An individual petition that focuses on the power of God’s name (vv. 1,6).
1 :To invoke God’s is a way of expressing one’s loyalty and sets up the expectation that God will come to the rescue.
Hear my prayer, O God; give ear to the words of my mouth.
For the insolent have risen against me, the ruthless seek my life; they do not set God before them. Selah
But surely, God is my helper; the Lord is the upholder of my life.
4 : A strong statement of trust in God as and who will punish the enemies.
He will repay my enemies for their evil. In your faithfulness, put an end to them.
With a freewill offering I will sacrifice to you; I will give thanks to your name, O Lord, for it is good.
6 : The psalmist offers God two motivations to help: a promise of a , and to thank God publicly.
For he has delivered me from every trouble, and my eye has looked in triumph on my enemies.
